story: As a product owner I would like the user to be able to search one product, add it to the cart and checkout

cases.title: Search for a product
cases.then: The product card with .pcard-name 'Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones' is visible

cases.title: Add product to cart
cases.given: User has searched for 'headphone' and the product card is visible
cases.when: User clicks the .add-btn on the product card

cases.title: Checkout the cart
cases.given: User has added a product to the cart

cases.title: Dismiss order confirmation
cases.when: User clicks the Continue Shopping button
cases.then: Order confirmation modal is no longer visible

cases.title: Clear search bar
cases.then: The search input is empty and all products are visible
